input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: a practice area for testing and tuning may be available

final_answer: A practice area for testing and tuning may be available
